splash.body: Line item spends! Deal scores! Discount thresholds! Oh my! All this seems like a lot to balance to get a media plan to a client. Let's see how IPAW and Slingshot benefit the everyone involved in the pre-sale phase.
Click on each icon to read how IPAW benefits each

conclusion.body: Conclusion Text Now that you know how to track pricing for your orders with IPAW, it’s time to jive on, Slick!

correct.body: You're IPAW chops are outta sight, cool cat!

incorrect.body: Not to bust your chops, but your draggin' and droppin' just ain't got that swing. Now get back in there and try again.

items.title: PYM
items.description: Pricing approvals through Slingshot mean client services submits fewer orders to this bandmate. That means they can focus on orders with negative deal scores and low average line item spends. That's a faster turnaround time for everyone!

items.title: Client Services
items.description: Less waiting for pricing approvals means faster sales planning for this role! Slingshot simplifies the pricing approval process. That's because it integrates the discount threshold and the deal score, among other details. That'll help this bandmate make faster pricing decisions and to get that plan to your client asap!

items.title: Clients
items.description: We might be one of many publishers that are bidding for this bandmate’s budget. They want our media plan options now! With Slingshot's automated pricing approvals, it'll speed up the deal approval process. Fo sho.
